# Prescription Modification Sample

## Modified Gui Zhi Tang (Cinnamon Decoction)

### Original Formula
Gui Zhi Tang: Gui Zhi (Cinnamon Twig) 3 liang (peeled), Shao Yao (White Peony) 3 liang, Gan Cao (Licorice) 2 liang (honey-fried), Sheng Jiang (Fresh Ginger) 3 liang (sliced), Da Zao (Jujube) 12 pieces (broken).

### Modification 1: For Neck and Back Stiffness
If (the condition) involves neck and back stiffness, **add Ge Gen (Kudzu Root) 4 liang**.

### Modification 2: For Asthma
If (the condition) involves asthma, **add Hou Po (Magnolia Bark) 2 liang, Xing Ren (Apricot Kernel) 50 pieces**.

### Modification 3: For Abdominal Fullness and Pain
If (the condition) involves abdominal fullness and pain, **remove Shao Yao (White Peony), add Fu Zi (Aconite) 1 piece**.

### Modification 4: For Yang Deficiency with Sweating
If (the condition) involves yang deficiency with profuse sweating, **remove Shao Yao (White Peony), add Fu Zi (Aconite) 1 piece**.

---

## Modified Ma Huang Tang (Ephedra Decoction)

### Original Formula
Ma Huang Tang: Ma Huang (Ephedra) 3 liang (removed nodes), Gui Zhi (Cinnamon Twig) 2 liang (peeled), Gan Cao (Licorice) 1 liang (honey-fried), Xing Ren (Apricot Kernel) 70 pieces (peeled tip).

### Modification 1: For Internal Heat
If (the condition) involves internal heat, **remove Gui Zhi (Cinnamon Twig), add Shi Gao (Gypsum) half jin**.

### Modification 2: For Dampness
If (the condition) involves dampness, **add Cang Zhu (Atractylodes) 2 liang**.

---

## Modified Xiao Chai Hu Tang (Minor Bupleurum Decoction)

### Original Formula
Xiao Chai Hu Tang: Chai Hu (Bupleurum) half jin, Huang Qin (Scutellaria) 3 liang, Ren Shen (Ginseng) 3 liang, Gan Cao (Licorice) 3 liang (honey-fried), Sheng Jiang (Fresh Ginger) 3 liang (sliced), Da Zao (Jujube) 12 pieces (broken), Ban Xia (Pinellia) half Sheng (washed).

### Modification 1: For Chest Distress without Vomiting
If (the condition) involves chest distress without vomiting, **remove Ban Xia (Pinellia) and Ren Shen (Ginseng), add Gua Lou Shi (Trichosanthes Fruit) 1 piece**.

### Modification 2: For Thirst
If (the condition) involves thirst, **remove Ban Xia (Pinellia), add Ren Shen (Ginseng) to make 4.5 liang total, add Tian Hua Fen (Trichosanthes Root) 4 liang**.

### Modification 3: For Abdominal Pain
If (the condition) involves abdominal pain, **remove Huang Qin (Scutellaria), add Shao Yao (White Peony) 3 liang**.

### Modification 4: For Subcostal Fullness and Hardness
If (the condition) involves subcostal fullness and hardness, **remove Da Zao (Jujube), add Mu Li (Oyster Shell) 4 liang**.

### Modification 5: For Palpitation
If (the condition) involves palpitation, **remove Huang Qin (Scutellaria), add Fu Ling (Poria) 4 liang**.

### Modification 6: For No Thirst with Mild Fever
If (the condition) involves no thirst with mild fever, **remove Ren Shen (Ginseng), add Gui Zhi (Cinnamon Twig) 3 liang, cover with blanket to induce mild sweating**.

### Modification 7: For Cough
If (the condition) involves cough, **remove Ren Shen (Ginseng), Da Zao (Jujube), Sheng Jiang (Fresh Ginger), add Wu Wei Zi (Schisandra) half Sheng, Gan Jiang (Dried Ginger) 2 liang**.
